title: B1 · Intermédiaire
subtitle: Work, travel, feelings, more nuanced verbs, common phrases.
focus: 1500 B1 French lemmas across work, study, opinions, travel, health, society and everyday nuance. Translation, example and example_en are placeholders for now.

groups.title: Group 1 · Core vocabulary
groups.focus: 100 real French lemmas across noun / verb / adj / adv / phrase. Translation and example fields are placeholders.

groups.title: Group 2 · Opinions et raisonnement
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for explaining opinions, reasoning, nuance, doubt and practical argument.

groups.title: Group 3 · Travail et organisation
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for office life, projects, responsibilities, planning and workplace problems.

groups.title: Group 4 · Études et apprentissage
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for study strategy, exams, research, academic work and learning habits.

groups.title: Group 5 · Santé et équilibre
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for appointments, symptoms, recovery, stress, habits and emotional balance.

groups.title: Group 6 · Relations et vie sociale
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for friendship, family, conflict, trust, apologies and social behaviour.

groups.title: Group 7 · Voyage et mobilité
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for planning trips, delays, reservations, transport problems and orientation.

groups.title: Group 8 · Logement et vie urbaine
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for housing, neighbourhoods, repairs, public space and everyday city problems.

groups.title: Group 9 · Environnement et consommation
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for climate, resources, waste, responsible habits and everyday consumption.

groups.title: Group 10 · Médias et numérique
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for online life, reliable information, devices, privacy and digital communication.

groups.title: Group 11 · Administration et démarches
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for forms, official requests, public services, complaints and paperwork.

groups.title: Group 12 · Culture et loisirs
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for books, cinema, performance, museums, hobbies and cultural events.

groups.title: Group 13 · Économie et argent
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for prices, income, saving, household budgets, banking and everyday economic choices.

groups.title: Group 14 · Récits et événements
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for telling stories, sequencing events, describing surprises, mistakes and results.

groups.title: Group 15 · Expressions idiomatiques et nuances
groups.focus: B1 vocabulary for common attitudes, discourse markers, reactions and idiomatic expressions.
